comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH. Hand-maintained. Dates ISO YYYY-MM-DD and must be SGX trading dates. provisional:true rows are drafts — replace values with actuals and set provisional:false to confirm. See README for schema.

transactions.note: Inception PLACEHOLDER — real trade date, price and fees to be supplied by ZH. Null price resolves to that day's close (4.04) until confirmed.
Drafted from Yahoo ex-date. Confirm actual cash credited and set amount + provisional:false.
